tag.name: ポップアップ - 3回目以降 振り分け表示（広告流入/通常）

parameter.value:
<script>
(function () {
  var KEY_COUNT = 'lp_session_count_v1';
  var KEY_SESSION_SEEN = 'lp_session_seen_v1';
  var KEY_ADS = 'lp_ads_inflow_v2';
  var KEY_ADS_BY = 'lp_ads_detected_by_v2';

  var safeGetStorage = function (type) {
    try {
      return window[type] || null;
    } catch (e) {
      return null;
    }
  };

  var toCount = function (value) {
    var n = parseInt(value, 10);
    return isNaN(n) || n < 0 ? 0 : n;
  };

  var getQueryParam = function (name) {
    var query = window.location.search || '';
    if (!query) {
      return '';
    }

    var escaped = name.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, '\\$&');
    var match = new RegExp('[?&]' + escaped + '=([^&#]*)').exec(query);
    return match ? decodeURIComponent((match[1] || '').replace(/\+/g, ' ')) : '';
  };

  var detectAdsInflow = function () {
    var gclid = getQueryParam('gclid');
    var gbraid = getQueryParam('gbraid');
    var wbraid = getQueryParam('wbraid');

    if (gclid || gbraid || wbraid) {
      return { isAds: true, by: 'gclid_family' };
    }

    var source = (getQueryParam('utm_source') || '').toLowerCase().replace(/^\s+|\s+$/g, '');
    var medium = (getQueryParam('utm_medium') || '').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g, '');
    var paidMedium = medium === 'cpc' || medium === 'ppc' || medium === 'paidsearch';

    if (source === 'google' && paidMedium) {
      return { isAds: true, by: 'utm_google_cpc' };
    }

    return { isAds: false, by: 'none' };
  };

  var pushShownEvent = function (popupType, sessionCount, adsDetectedBy) {
    window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
    window.dataLayer.push({
      event: 'lp_popup_shown',
      popup_type: popupType,
      session_count: sessionCount,
      ads_detected_by: adsDetectedBy
    });
  };

  var showModal = function (config) {
    if (!document.body || document.getElementById('lp-popup-overlay-v2')) {
      return;
    }

    var overlay = document.createElement('div');
    overlay.id = 'lp-popup-overlay-v2';
    overlay.style.cssText = [
      'position:fixed',
      'top:0',
      'right:0',
      'bottom:0',
      'left:0',
      'z-index:2147483000',
      'background:rgba(0,0,0,0.45)',
      'display:flex',
      'align-items:center',
      'justify-content:center',
      'padding:20px'
    ].join(';');

    var modal = document.createElement('div');
    modal.setAttribute('role', 'dialog');
    modal.setAttribute('aria-modal', 'true');
    modal.style.cssText = [
      'width:92vw',
      'max-width:460px',
      'background:#ffffff',
      'border-radius:14px',
      'border:2px solid ' + config.accent,
      'box-shadow:0 24px 64px rgba(0,0,0,0.28)',
      'overflow:hidden'
    ].join(';');

    var head = document.createElement('div');
    head.style.cssText = [
      'padding:14px 18px',
      'font-weight:700',
      'font-size:16px',
      'background:' + config.softBg,
      'color:' + config.accent
    ].join(';');
    head.appendChild(document.createTextNode(config.heading));

    var body = document.createElement('div');
    body.style.cssText = 'padding:18px 18px 10px;color:#111827;line-height:1.75;font-size:15px;';
    body.appendChild(document.createTextNode(config.message));

    var footer = document.createElement('div');
    footer.style.cssText = 'display:flex;justify-content:flex-end;padding:0 18px 18px;';

    var closeBtn = document.createElement('button');
    closeBtn.type = 'button';
    closeBtn.appendChild(document.createTextNode('髢峨§繧・));
    closeBtn.style.cssText = [
      'border:none',
      'border-radius:8px',
      'padding:9px 14px',
      'font-size:14px',
      'font-weight:700',
      'cursor:pointer',
      'background:' + config.accent,
      'color:#ffffff'
    ].join(';');

    var closeModal = function () {
      if (overlay && overlay.parentNode) {
        overlay.parentNode.removeChild(overlay);
      }
    };

    closeBtn.addEventListener('click', closeModal);
    overlay.addEventListener('click', function (event) {
      if (event.target === overlay) {
        closeModal();
      }
    });

    footer.appendChild(closeBtn);
    modal.appendChild(head);
    modal.appendChild(body);
    modal.appendChild(footer);
    overlay.appendChild(modal);
    document.body.appendChild(overlay);
  };

  try {
    var ls = safeGetStorage('localStorage');
    var ss = safeGetStorage('sessionStorage');
    if (!ls || !ss) {
      return;
    }

    var sessionSeen = ss.getItem(KEY_SESSION_SEEN) === '1';
    var sessionCount = toCount(ls.getItem(KEY_COUNT));

    if (!sessionSeen) {
      sessionCount += 1;
      ls.setItem(KEY_COUNT, String(sessionCount));
      ss.setItem(KEY_SESSION_SEEN, '1');
    } else if (sessionCount === 0) {
      sessionCount = 1;
      ls.setItem(KEY_COUNT, '1');
    }

    var detected = detectAdsInflow();
    var adsInflow = ss.getItem(KEY_ADS) === '1';
    var adsDetectedBy = ss.getItem(KEY_ADS_BY) || 'none';

    if (detected.isAds) {
      adsInflow = true;
      adsDetectedBy = detected.by;
      ss.setItem(KEY_ADS, '1');
      ss.setItem(KEY_ADS_BY, adsDetectedBy);
    }

    if (sessionCount < 3) {
      return;
    }

    var isAdsPopup = adsInflow;
    var popupType = isAdsPopup ? 'ads_ui' : 'returning_ui';
    var config = isAdsPopup
      ? {
          heading: '蠎・相繧偵＃隕ｧ縺・◆縺縺・◆譁ｹ縺ｸ',
          message: '蠎・相繧定ｪｭ繧薙〒縺上□縺輔ｊ縺ゅｊ縺後→縺・＃縺悶＞縺ｾ縺・,
          accent: '#d97706',
          softBg: '#fff7ed'
        }
      : {
          heading: '蜀崎ｨｪ縺ゅｊ縺後→縺・＃縺悶＞縺ｾ縺・,
          message: '蜀榊ｺｦ譚･險ｪ縺ゅｊ縺後→縺・＃縺悶＞縺ｾ縺・,
          accent: '#2563eb',
          softBg: '#eff6ff'
        };

    var render = function () {
      showModal(config);
      pushShownEvent(popupType, sessionCount, adsDetectedBy);
    };

    if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
      document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function onReady() {
        render();
      });
    } else {
      render();
    }
  } catch (e) {
    // Fail safe: never block page rendering because of popup logic.
  }
})();
</script>

<script>
(function () {
  var HEADING = '4蝗樒岼縺ｮ縺疲擂險ｪ縺ゅｊ縺後→縺・＃縺悶＞縺ｾ縺・;
  var MESSAGE = '4蝗樒岼縺ｮ縺疲擂險ｪ繧偵＞縺溘□縺阪∪縺励※縲√≠繧翫′縺ｨ縺・＃縺悶＞縺ｾ縺吶・;
  var ACCENT = '#0f766e';
  var SOFT_BG = '#ecfeff';

  var showModal = function () {
    if (!document.body || document.getElementById('lp-popup-overlay-v5')) {
      return;
    }

    var overlay = document.createElement('div');
    overlay.id = 'lp-popup-overlay-v5';
    overlay.style.cssText = [
      'position:fixed',
      'top:0',
      'right:0',
      'bottom:0',
      'left:0',
      'z-index:2147483000',
      'background:rgba(0,0,0,0.45)',
      'display:flex',
      'align-items:center',
      'justify-content:center',
      'padding:20px'
    ].join(';');

    var modal = document.createElement('div');
    modal.setAttribute('role', 'dialog');
    modal.setAttribute('aria-modal', 'true');
    modal.style.cssText = [
      'width:92vw',
      'max-width:460px',
      'background:#ffffff',
      'border-radius:14px',
      'border:2px solid ' + ACCENT,
      'box-shadow:0 24px 64px rgba(0,0,0,0.28)',
      'overflow:hidden'
    ].join(';');

    var head = document.createElement('div');
    head.style.cssText = [
      'padding:14px 18px',
      'font-weight:700',
      'font-size:16px',
      'background:' + SOFT_BG,
      'color:' + ACCENT
    ].join(';');
    head.appendChild(document.createTextNode(HEADING));

    var body = document.createElement('div');
    body.style.cssText = 'padding:18px 18px 10px;color:#111827;line-height:1.75;font-size:15px;';
    body.appendChild(document.createTextNode(MESSAGE));

    var footer = document.createElement('div');
    footer.style.cssText = 'display:flex;justify-content:flex-end;padding:0 18px 18px;';

    var closeBtn = document.createElement('button');
    closeBtn.type = 'button';
    closeBtn.appendChild(document.createTextNode('髢峨§繧・));
    closeBtn.style.cssText = [
      'border:none',
      'border-radius:8px',
      'padding:9px 14px',
      'font-size:14px',
      'font-weight:700',
      'cursor:pointer',
      'background:' + ACCENT,
      'color:#ffffff'
    ].join(';');

    var closeModal = function () {
      if (overlay && overlay.parentNode) {
        overlay.parentNode.removeChild(overlay);
      }
    };

    closeBtn.addEventListener('click', closeModal);
    overlay.addEventListener('click', function (event) {
      if (event.target === overlay) {
        closeModal();
      }
    });

    footer.appendChild(closeBtn);
    modal.appendChild(head);
    modal.appendChild(body);
    modal.appendChild(footer);
    overlay.appendChild(modal);
    document.body.appendChild(overlay);
  };

  try {
    if (window.__lpPopupShownV5) {
      return;
    }

    var run = function () {
      if (window.__lpPopupShownV5) {
        return;
      }
      showModal();
      window.__lpPopupShownV5 = true;
    };

    if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
      document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', run);
    } else {
      run();
    }
  } catch (e) {
    // Fail safe
  }
})();
</script>

<script>
(function () {
  var HEADING = '\u5E83\u544A\u3092\u30AF\u30EA\u30C3\u30AF\u3057\u305F\u65B9\u9650\u5B9A\u30AD\u30E3\u30F3\u30DA\u30FC\u30F3';
  var MESSAGE = 'HP\u4E0A\u306E\u30CD\u30BA\u30DF\u3092\u898B\u3064\u3051\u305F\u3089\u30EA\u30B9\u30C6\u30A3\u30F3\u30B0\u5E83\u544A\u8A2D\u5B9A\u304C\u7121\u6599\u3002\u7B54\u3048\u306FGoogle\u30D5\u30A9\u30FC\u30E0\u3078';

    head.appendChild(document.createTextNode(HEADING));

    var body = document.createElement('div');
    body.style.cssText = 'padding:18px 18px 10px;color:#111827;line-height:1.75;font-size:15px;';
    body.appendChild(document.createTextNode(MESSAGE));

    var footer = document.createElement('div');
    footer.style.cssText = 'display:flex;justify-content:flex-end;padding:0 18px 18px;';

    var closeBtn = document.createElement('button');
    closeBtn.type = 'button';
    closeBtn.appendChild(document.createTextNode('\u9589\u3058\u308B'));
    closeBtn.style.cssText = [
      'border:none',
      'border-radius:8px',
      'padding:9px 14px',
      'font-size:14px',
      'font-weight:700',
      'cursor:pointer',
      'background:' + ACCENT,
      'color:#ffffff'
    ].join(';');

    var closeModal = function () {
      if (overlay && overlay.parentNode) {
        overlay.parentNode.removeChild(overlay);
      }
    };

    closeBtn.addEventListener('click', closeModal);
    overlay.addEventListener('click', function (event) {
      if (event.target === overlay) {
        closeModal();
      }
    });

    footer.appendChild(closeBtn);
    modal.appendChild(head);
    modal.appendChild(body);
    modal.appendChild(footer);
    overlay.appendChild(modal);
    document.body.appendChild(overlay);
  };

  try {
    if (window.__lpPopupShownV5) {
      return;
    }

    var run = function () {
      if (window.__lpPopupShownV5) {
        return;
      }
      showModal();
      window.__lpPopupShownV5 = true;
    };

    if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
      document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', run);
    } else {
      run();
    }
  } catch (e) {
    // Fail safe
  }
})();
</script>

(function () {

  var showModal = function () {

    var closeModal = function () {

        overlay.parentNode.removeChild(overlay);
      }

    closeBtn.addEventListener('click', closeModal);
    overlay.addEventListener('click', function (event) {

        closeModal();
      }
    });

    footer.appendChild(closeBtn);
    modal.appendChild(head);
    modal.appendChild(body);
    modal.appendChild(footer);
    overlay.appendChild(modal);
    document.body.appendChild(overlay);
  };

  try {
    if (window.__lpPopupShownV5) {
      return;
    }

    var run = function () {
      if (window.__lpPopupShownV5) {
        return;
      }
      showModal();

    };

    if (document.readyState === 'loading') {

      run();
    }
  } catch (e) {
    // Fail safe
  }
})();

tag.name: ポップアップ - 表示イベント振り分け（広告/3回目/4回目/Google経由）

parameter.value:
<script>
(function () {
  var KEY_COUNT = 'lp_session_count_v1';
  var KEY_SESSION_SEEN = 'lp_session_seen_v1';
  var KEY_ADS = 'lp_ads_inflow_v2';
  var KEY_ADS_BY = 'lp_ads_detected_by_v2';

  if (window.__lpPopupInitV5) {
    return;
  }
  window.__lpPopupInitV5 = true;

  var safeGetStorage = function (type) {
    try {
      return window[type] || null;
    } catch (e) {
      return null;
    }
  };

  var toCount = function (value) {
    var n = parseInt(value, 10);
    return isNaN(n) || n < 0 ? 0 : n;
  };

  var getQueryParam = function (name) {
    var query = window.location.search || '';
    if (!query) {
      return '';
    }
    var escaped = name.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, '\\$&');
    var match = new RegExp('[?&]' + escaped + '=([^&#]*)').exec(query);
    return match ? decodeURIComponent((match[1] || '').replace(/\+/g, ' ')) : '';
  };

  var detectAdsInflow = function () {
    var gclid = getQueryParam('gclid');
    var gbraid = getQueryParam('gbraid');
    var wbraid = getQueryParam('wbraid');

    if (gclid || gbraid || wbraid) {
      return { isAds: true, by: 'gclid_family' };
    }

    var source = (getQueryParam('utm_source') || '').toLowerCase().replace(/^\s+|\s+$/g, '');
    var medium = (getQueryParam('utm_medium') || '').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g, '');
    var paidMedium = medium === 'cpc' || medium === 'ppc' || medium === 'paidsearch';

    if (source === 'google' && paidMedium) {
      return { isAds: true, by: 'utm_google_cpc' };
    }

    return { isAds: false, by: 'none' };
  };

  var isGoogleReferrer = function () {
    var ref = (document.referrer || '').toLowerCase();
    return /(^https?:\/\/)?([a-z0-9-]+\.)*google\.[a-z.]+(\/|$)/.test(ref);
  };

  try {
    var ls = safeGetStorage('localStorage');
    var ss = safeGetStorage('sessionStorage');
    if (!ls || !ss) {
      return;
    }

    var sessionSeen = ss.getItem(KEY_SESSION_SEEN) === '1';
    var sessionCount = toCount(ls.getItem(KEY_COUNT));

    if (!sessionSeen) {
      sessionCount += 1;
      ls.setItem(KEY_COUNT, String(sessionCount));
      ss.setItem(KEY_SESSION_SEEN, '1');
    } else if (sessionCount === 0) {
      sessionCount = 1;
      ls.setItem(KEY_COUNT, '1');
    }

    var detected = detectAdsInflow();
    var adsInflow = ss.getItem(KEY_ADS) === '1';
    var adsDetectedBy = ss.getItem(KEY_ADS_BY) || 'none';

    if (detected.isAds) {
      adsInflow = true;
      adsDetectedBy = detected.by;
      ss.setItem(KEY_ADS, '1');
      ss.setItem(KEY_ADS_BY, adsDetectedBy);
    }

    var payload = {
      session_count: sessionCount,
      ads_detected_by: adsDetectedBy,
      ads_inflow: adsInflow ? '1' : '0'
    };

    window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];

    if (adsInflow) {
      payload.event = 'lp_popup_ads';
      window.dataLayer.push(payload);
      return;
    }

    if (sessionCount === 3) {
      payload.event = 'lp_popup_visit3';
      window.dataLayer.push(payload);
      return;
    }

    if (sessionCount === 4) {
      payload.event = 'lp_popup_visit4';
      window.dataLayer.push(payload);
      return;
    }

    if (isGoogleReferrer()) {
      payload.event = 'lp_popup_google_referrer';
      window.dataLayer.push(payload);
      return;
    }
  } catch (e) {
    // Fail safe
  }
})();
</script>

tag.name: ポップアップUI - 秋田県向けYouTube告知（右下）

parameter.value:
<script>
(function () {
  var POPUP_ID = 'gtm-akita-listing-youtube-popup';
  var STYLE_ID = 'gtm-akita-listing-youtube-popup-style';
  var TARGET_URL = 'https://youtube.com/live/ebkV9hnEAGQ';
  var TEXT_LABEL = '\u516c\u958b\u4e2d';
  var TEXT_LINE1 = '\u79cb\u7530\u770c\u306e\u65b9\u9650\u5b9a';
  var TEXT_LINE2 = '\u30ea\u30b9\u30c6\u30a3\u30f3\u30b0\u5e83\u544a\u306e\u8a2d\u5b9a\u65b9\u6cd5\u3092\u516c\u958b\u4e2d';
  var TEXT_CTA = '\u52d5\u753b\u3092\u898b\u308b >';
  var TEXT_CLOSE_ARIA = '\u30dd\u30c3\u30d7\u30a2\u30c3\u30d7\u3092\u9589\u3058\u308b';

  if (document.getElementById(POPUP_ID)) return;

  var style = document.getElementById(STYLE_ID);
  if (!style) {
    style = document.createElement('style');
    style.id = STYLE_ID;
    style.textContent = '' +
      '#' + POPUP_ID + ' {position:fixed;right:16px;bottom:16px;z-index:2147483000;font-family:"Hiragino Kaku Gothic ProN","Yu Gothic","Meiryo",sans-serif;}' +
      '#' + POPUP_ID + ' .card {display:block;width:300px;max-width:calc(100vw - 32px);text-decoration:none;background:linear-gradient(145deg,#0f172a,#111827);color:#fff;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.18);border-radius:14px;box-shadow:0 14px 34px rgba(0,0,0,.34);padding:14px 14px 12px;line-height:1.5;}' +
      '#' + POPUP_ID + ' .label {display:inline-block;background:#ef4444;color:#fff;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.02em;padding:4px 8px;border-radius:999px;margin:0 0 8px;}' +
      '#' + POPUP_ID + ' .line1 {font-size:18px;font-weight:700;margin:0 0 4px;}' +
      '#' + POPUP_ID + ' .line2 {font-size:15px;font-weight:500;opacity:.98;margin:0 0 8px;}' +
      '#' + POPUP_ID + ' .cta {font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:#fde68a;}' +
      '#' + POPUP_ID + ' .close {position:absolute;top:-10px;right:-10px;width:24px;height:24px;border:none;border-radius:999px;background:#111827;color:#fff;cursor:pointer;box-shadow:0 6px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.25);line-height:24px;padding:0;font-size:15px;}' +
      '#' + POPUP_ID + ' .close:focus {outline:2px solid #93c5fd;outline-offset:2px;}';
    document.head.appendChild(style);
  }

  var root = document.createElement('div');
  root.id = POPUP_ID;

  var closeButton = document.createElement('button');
  closeButton.type = 'button';
  closeButton.className = 'close';
  closeButton.setAttribute('aria-label', TEXT_CLOSE_ARIA);
  closeButton.innerHTML = '×';
  closeButton.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
    e.preventDefault();
    e.stopPropagation();
    if (root.parentNode) root.parentNode.removeChild(root);
  });

  var link = document.createElement('a');
  link.className = 'card';
  link.href = TARGET_URL;
  link.target = '_blank';
  link.rel = 'noopener noreferrer';


  link.addEventListener('click', function () {
    window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
    window.dataLayer.push({
      event: 'akita_popup_youtube_click',
      popup_id: POPUP_ID,
      popup_position: 'bottom_right',
      destination_url: TARGET_URL
    });
  });
  var pLabel = document.createElement('p');
  pLabel.className = 'label';
  pLabel.textContent = TEXT_LABEL;

  var pLine1 = document.createElement('p');
  pLine1.className = 'line1';
  pLine1.textContent = TEXT_LINE1;

  var pLine2 = document.createElement('p');
  pLine2.className = 'line2';
  pLine2.textContent = TEXT_LINE2;

  var pCta = document.createElement('p');
  pCta.className = 'cta';
  pCta.textContent = TEXT_CTA;

  link.appendChild(pLabel);
  link.appendChild(pLine1);
  link.appendChild(pLine2);
  link.appendChild(pCta);

  root.appendChild(closeButton);
  root.appendChild(link);
  document.body.appendChild(root);
})();
</script>
